mapper.select: select log_id, tenant_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, oper_by, oper_time from scm_tenant_modify_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by oper_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant_modify_log (log_id, tenant_id, field_name, old_value, new_value, oper_by, oper_time) values (#{logId}, #{tenantId}, #{fieldName}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{operBy}, #{operTime})
